text.title: Ai Powered Pm Tools — Decision Tree

decision-tree.root-question: Does the org have an existing platform, ≥10 seats, named buyer, and budget for AI-tier uplift?

branch.when: existing_platform_present == true AND seat_count >= 10 AND named_buyer == true AND budget_approved == true
branch.conclusion: Run the selection: evaluate AI-tier of the incumbent first; switch only if uplift fails ROI gate.
Skip. Per-seat AI uplift does not pay back at this scale; use a CLI/Claude workflow instead.
Block. Approve budget or defer; selection without budget invites churn.
